Tanker Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
October 7, 2025
• VLCC Market Softens as Post Golden Week Demand Fails to Gain Traction -
Short-term Indicators
As September ends, the previously robust VLCC market driven by tight supply and
Momentum: Negative
high activity has shown signs of softening in demand, with spot rates retreating
from the multi-year highs reached recently. The pullback highlights the market's Sentiment: Neutral
fragility and its sensitivity to incremental small shifts in demand. Sentiment Fundamentals: Positive
weakened further as the anticipated post-Golden Week rebound did not
materialize.
